title: PushUrgency::Unknown serializes as literal "unknown" in ChatPushConfig
description: Trigger: server sends a supported_urgency_values list containing an unrecognized urgency string (e.g. "very-high"). ChatPushCapability.supported_urgency_values deserializes it as PushUrgency::Unknown. A caller who iterates that list to pick a value and assigns it to ChatPushConfig.urgency or ChatPushConfig.mention_urgency will serialize it as the literal string "unknown" — not the original wire string. The server receives "unknown" and rejects it as an invalid urgency. The original value is silently discarded by serde's #[serde(other)] mechanism.
